pageContext.name: Kundaliel: Angel of Ophiuchus
pageContext.description: Sideshow Art Prints presents the Kundaliel: Angel of Ophiuchus Fine Art Print, a fantasy art design by artist Peter Mohrbacher. Part of his original Angelarium series, this striking portrait recognizes the secretive, serpentine Master of the Zodiac.  From the mind of Peter Mohrbacher, the Angelarium project has grown into an artistic anthology of designs inspired by numerous named angels throughout mythology. The Angels of the Zodiac embody the cardinal constellations that sit along the sun's celestial path. The mysterious Kundaliel embodies the symbolic serpent-bearer Ophiuchus in cosmic tradition. The Master's numerous snake tails ripple gracefully, seated on a throne above the climbing heights of a forest.  This enigmatic illustration is now being offered to fans in a high-end, museum quality print format for the first time in collaboration with Sideshow Art Prints. Each Kundaliel: Angel of Ophiuchus Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Angelarium series logo as a part of the limited edition of 250 pieces. Available as an unframed giclée and in a custom framed presentation, this angelic fantasy artwork makes a truly unique addition to any collection, especially alongside other Angelarium art prints.  Divine the secrets of the zodiac for yourself — bring home the Kundaliel: Angel of Ophiuchus Fine Art Print by Peter Mohrbacher today!
